text: Maintain a shared Spend Category catalogue and support explicit Category Assignment and correction without rewriting original transaction facts. Evidence: direct — the owner requires categorized spend across all accounts; workflows UC-LEDGER-003 and UC-LEDGER-008.
target: Categories have stable create/list/rename/archive behavior; every categorized transaction has explicit attributable allocation history; category remains independent from account, Payment Instrument, cardholder, and Spend Pool; archived categories preserve history.
